goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PSTR (*CC(c1ccccc1)*)
assumptions: PSTR is confidence=medium and IS in polymer_rules.json with class-specific temperatures (T_equil=550, anneal=630, tg sweep 200-600 K); group-contribution Tg estimation is therefore skipped per decision_policy.
Atactic amorphous PS; exp Tg ~373 K, exp RT density 1.05 g/cm3, exp glassy K_T 3.3-4.0 GPa.
PS is GLASSY at the 300 K property-extraction temperature (exp Tg 373 K > 300 K); T_workflow_K=550 is the melt/equil temperature, not the property temperature.
DP=40 (>= dp_min 30) averages atactic tacticity for Tg; below entanglement Me (DP@Me~160) so deformation K is underestimated ~30-50% (Murnaghan is primary and less size-sensitive).

uncertainties.name: ff_transferability
uncertainties.note: No direct PCFF PS Tg validation paper exists (confidence=medium). PCFF Class II is validated for PC and PMMA vinyl backbone within 10%, used here by analogy. SimPoly reports MD Tg 399+/-22 K vs exp 373 K; expect MD overprediction. A literature_anchor probe (search_ff_literature) could surface a direct PCFF PS reference; recorded as PLANNED, not executed.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: hardware_policy.values_are_benchmarked=false and directional_probe host (A800/A100) != live host (RTX 6000). by_forcefield.pcff default (kokkos/mpi1/1GPU) is adopted without override; a hardware_benchmark probe on the built .data would confirm the optimum on this host. PLANNED, not executed.

uncertainties.name: tg_slope_gate_seed_sensitivity
uncertainties.note: PS PCFF multirate slope-gate is seed/build-dependent (PS2 failed-inverted, PS3 passed with a fresh seed -> Tg 376.5 K = exp). Mitigated downstream by the orchestrator's fresh-seed recovery (max 2 attempts), not at plan time.

evidence.claim: PCFF (Class II) via EMC. Switched from TraPPE-UA 2026-06-11 because UA ignores phenyl ring partial charges and pi-dihedral barriers that govern PS Tg (~373 K). PCFF Class II explicitly parameterizes aromatic C-H charges and cross-terms; full parameter coverage for the pure C/H aromatic styrene repeat unit.
PCFF Class II validated for polycarbonate (Tg 417 K vs exp 422 K) and PMMA vinyl backbone (within 10%) - transferable to PS vinyl + aromatic backbone by analogy.
Soldera2006 (COMPASS/OPLS) shows MD reaches PS Tg ~449-484 K raw, WLF-corrected to ~373 K - establishes the MD-overprediction baseline this run is graded against.
No direct PCFF PS Tg validation paper found - confidence=medium; ff_transferability is the dominant uncertainty (see uncertainties[]).

alternatives.rejected_because: UA omits phenyl ring partial charges and pi-dihedral barriers; no TraPPE-UA PS Tg validation exists. Would bias Tg.
alternatives.known_error: no validated PS Tg; qualitatively wrong backbone stiffness

alternatives.rejected_because: Tg error >45% for PMMA vinyl backbone reported; not competitive with Class II for vinyl/acrylic/styrenic Tg.

evidence.claim: PCFF uses bond-increment charges (FF-embedded), consistent with the chosen Class II FF. The aromatic ring carries non-trivial partial charges/pi polarization, which bond-increments capture without a QM step.

RESP (HF/6-31G*) would better capture ring pi-polarization (polymer_rules note) but is not required at confidence=medium; bond-increment is the validated default for the PCFF/EMC path and keeps charges consistent with the FF.

alternatives.rejected_because: QM charges recommended for ring pi-system polarization but not required at this confidence; adds cost and breaks FF/charge consistency with bond-increment-parameterized PCFF.

evidence.claim: PSTR requires PPPM: PCFF assigns aromatic-ring pi-system partial charges to the styrene phenyl group, so long-range Coulomb is non-negligible even though the backbone is pure C/H. lj/cut is acceptable only for purely apolar UA classes (PHYC/PDIE); neglecting long-range Coulomb biases density/Tg 5-20% for charged backbones.

alternatives.rejected_because: PCFF places partial charges on the aromatic ring; truncating Coulomb would bias density/Tg. Only valid for charge-free UA backbones.

evidence.claim: DP=40 >= dp_min 30, the floor needed to average atactic tacticity fluctuations for a converged Tg (Soldera2006). Tg is chain-length-independent above DP>=30. nchain=10 gives ~6,400 atoms, large enough to avoid self-imaging at cutoff 12 A.
Experimental Tg target 373 K (atactic amorphous PS); T sweep 200-600 K brackets it with wide margin on both sides (MD Tg expected ~399+/-22 K per SimPoly).

DP=40 < entanglement Me (DP@Me ~160, a-PS Me=16,600 g/mol; Mark2007 Table 25.4): deformation K underestimated ~30-50%. Mitigated by using Murnaghan NPT compression as primary (less size-sensitive than uniaxial deformation).

alternatives.rejected_because: Required for fully converged deformation K but ~4x the atoms / GPU budget; out of scope for a combined Tg+density+K screening run. Offset flagged in run summary instead.

decisions.choice: T sweep 200-600 K, step 20 K (21 bins); rates [25,50,100] K/ns; 500000 steps/T

evidence.claim: Sweep 200-600 K (21 bins at 20 K) brackets exp Tg 373 K and the expected MD Tg ~399-430 K with margin on both sides, supporting a robust bilinear fit (>4 bins each side).

Every rate clears the tg_min_steps_per_T floor: N = tg_t_step_K/(rate*dt_fs*1e-6). At dt=1 fs, step=20 K: rate 25 -> 800000 steps (800 ps), rate 50 -> 400000 (400 ps), rate 100 -> 200000 (200 ps) >= 200000 floor. The retired [40,160,400] ladder gave degenerate 50/125 ps fits; [25,50,100] is the validated PS3 ladder.

Slowest rate (25 K/ns) is reported by convention if slope-gate passes; PS3 passed with a fresh seed giving Tg 376.5 K vs exp 373 K. DSC log-linear extrapolation over a ~1-decade rate span is unreliable (R^2<0.90) - handled downstream by the slope-gate / tg_at_slow_rate patch, not at plan time.

alternatives.rejected_because: Retired - produces 50/125 ps degenerate fits below the steps-per-T floor.

decisions.choice: Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (glassy primary); deform fallback; bilinear Tg

evidence.claim: PS is glassy at 300 K (exp Tg 373 K > 300 K), so bulk_modulus is extracted via Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (symmetric, cell-size independent; Wu 2019 validated). 3-direction uniaxial deformation is the fallback if Murnaghan fails (fit_converged=False or B0_prime outside [4,20]). Born+NVT removed (PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility).

is_glassy will be taken from the measured Tg (>300 K expected) since tg is requested; exp glassy K_T 3.3-4.0 GPa (Mark2007 Table 7.6, Zoller 1978). MD strain-rate artifact overestimates K ~1.5-2x vs quasistatic experiment - flagged in summary.

alternatives.rejected_because: PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility (K_Born 8-15x too high; failed 3/3 pipeline runs PMMA4/PVC1/PEEK1). Removed campaign-wide.

evidence.claim: FF family pcff (PCFF Class II + PPPM). Estimated cell ~6,400 atoms (DP40 x nchain10 x 16 all-atom styrene-repeat atoms), <10k -> 1 GPU. Adopt the by_forcefield.pcff default (engine=kokkos, mpi=1, gpu_per_run=1): KOKKOS full-offload puts pair+class2 bonded+pppm+neigh on the GPU, mpi=1 canonical (kspace on GPU, not CPU-serial), ~7.9x vs gpu-pkg, and 1 core/run enables ~4 concurrent runs across 4 GPUs. Parity run-0 PASS 2026-06-20.

directional_probe is a HINT only here: values_are_benchmarked=false and the probe host (A800/A100, measured_on 2026-06-21) does NOT match the live host (Quadro RTX 6000). Estimated cell ~6,400 atoms is ~2.1x the benchmark pcff cell (3,020 atoms), just outside the [0.5x,2x] adopt window. Therefore NOT adopting recommended_by_ff[pcff] absolute throughput; keep the by_forcefield default and do NOT write a hardware override into decided_params (keeps worker prompt on the policy path). D-08 confidence=low + a planned hardware_benchmark probe (see uncertainties.hardware_optimum).

alternatives.rejected_because: Requires both an estimated cell >~10k atoms AND host-matched benchmark support; cell is ~6,400 atoms and host is unbenchmarked. Also PPPM KOKKOS does not benefit from packing >1 run/GPU (measured 1.00x with MPS).
~7.9x slower than KOKKOS full-offload for PCFF; consumes 4 cores/run, reducing concurrency.

findings: Gate verified independently: PSTR confidence=medium -> reasoned mode (matches plan_mode). Full policy review applied.

D-01_ff/D-03_electrostatics/D-07_property_method (evidence_required): criteria fully covered, source_doi/citation present, alternatives recorded with known errors, hard require clauses satisfied (PCFF C/H aromatic coverage, pppm for ring partial charges, glassy Murnaghan-300K primary + deform fallback + Born removed).
D-06_tg: rates [25,50,100] all clear the 200k-step/T floor (800k/400k/200k); 200-600 K brackets exp Tg 373 K.

D-08_hardware: kokkos/mpi1/1GPU is the by_forcefield.pcff default (KOKKOS full-offload, kspace on GPU -> mpi=1 canonical, NOT the stale GPU-package mpi>=4 anti-pattern). Correctly kept OFF decided_params with confidence:low + planned hardware_benchmark probe given values_are_benchmarked=false and host mismatch (RTX6000 vs A800). No multi-GPU pin; ~6.4k atoms < 10k -> 1 GPU. Clean.

All 9 planned_stages satisfy stage_schema (stage/track/success_criteria; tracks valid; stage->track pairings match track_map). Dominant uncertainty ff_transferability named; reduction probes literature_anchor/hardware_benchmark valid.
